purpose: Normalized semantic/state surfaces for imperial owner dashboard truth projection

truth_contract.disclosure_rule: exact_derived_gap_disclosure must expose unknown_reason_breakdown and unknown_reason_registry
truth_contract.truth_integrity_rule: semantic surfaces must include source_integrity and must not expose hardcoded counters as exact truth

section_notes.constitution_state: Constitution posture, canon drift risk, exact canon boundaries, and source integrity.
section_notes.brain_reason_control_state: Mission/task/command consistency, contradiction/trust control health, and consistency matrix.
section_notes.memory_chronology_knowledge_state: Known/open/next map with last working step, chronology nodes, and age axis.
section_notes.product_state_integration: Training-ground product runtime/process/recovery and prompt-lineage honesty boundary.
section_notes.security_sovereignty_posture_state: Local sovereignty, external exposure, visibility restrictions, and recovery doctrine posture.
section_notes.exact_derived_gap_disclosure: Explicit exact/derived/gap disclosure with reasoned UNKNOWN taxonomy.

visual_binding.raw_secondary_rule: technical inspector is command/debug only, not full vision default
